BeforeLoginNews.subheader: Welcome to Mongolian Aupair! We make your path abroad easier than ever before.
BeforeLoginNews.simple_desc: Our system guides you step-by-step through your application with smart hints.
BeforeLoginNews.flex_desc: Manage your profile on mobile, tablet, or PC – at your own pace.
BeforeLoginNews.security_desc: State-of-the-art encryption and strict data protection to keep your info safe.
BeforeLoginNews.free_desc: Registration is 100% free. It only becomes binding upon successful placement.

HeroSlider.slide1_desc: We offer Mongolian youth the best opportunity to live in European countries while learning a language and experiencing world culture. Over the last 20 years, we have guided more than 3,000 young people on their path of development.
HeroSlider.slide2_desc: By joining the Au Pair program, you become a member of a host family and experience European customs from within. Monthly pocket money, free room and board, and travel rights await you.

UsSection.desc1: Established in 2005, our story isn't just about business—it's about opening doors to global opportunities.
UsSection.desc2: Born from the personal Au-Pair experience of our founder in Germany, we bridge the gap between Mongolian ambition and European opportunity.
UsSection.quote: Experience is the clearest lens through which to see the future.

Expectations.title: Your Journey Abroad
Expectations.subtitle: Four simple steps to start your new life in Europe.
Expectations.step3_desc: We help you match with a host family.

WhyChooseUs.desc: We combine heartfelt care with rigorous safety standards to give you the most trusted Au Pair experience.
WhyChooseUs.card1_desc: Connecting you to verified families across Europe's most beautiful cities.
WhyChooseUs.card2_desc: No bots here. Just real people ready to help you 24/7.
WhyChooseUs.card3_desc: No hidden fees. We prioritize clarity.
WhyChooseUs.card4_desc: Strict vetting process for every family. Your safety is our obsession.
WhyChooseUs.card5_desc: It's free to create a profile.

AuPair.heroSub: Live abroad, learn a new culture and language, and gain experience. Improve your language skills in a native environment in Europe.
AuPair.whatIsP1: The Au-Pair program is an international cultural exchange program for young people aged 18-26. The word Au-Pair comes from French meaning
AuPair.whatIsBox: This expresses the idea that you become a member of the host family and live on equal terms with them during your stay.
AuPair.historyP1: Strasbourg, France. The program was officially approved by the Council of Europe meeting.
AuPair.historyP2: While only Europeans participated at that time, today it is successfully implemented in many countries around the world, including Mongolia, opening global doors for youth.
AuPair.benefitsSub: A real investment in your future.
AuPair.benefit1_desc: Real experience of living abroad and learning a new culture.
AuPair.benefit2_desc: Master a foreign language perfectly in its environment and attend language courses.
AuPair.benefit3_desc: Opportunity to travel freely in Europe and around the world.
AuPair.benefit4_desc: Receive regular pocket money every month and become financially independent.
AuPair.benefit5_desc: International work experience will be a huge advantage for your future career.
AuPair.benefit6_desc: Make new friends from all over the world and expand your network.
AuPair.step1_desc: If you choose Germany, attend A1 level training and take the Goethe exam.
AuPair.step2_desc: Compile documents according to ECAPS standards and attend orientation training.
AuPair.step3_desc: Connect with a host family, interview, and confirm the contract.
AuPair.step4_desc: Get professional advice and instructions on applying for a visa at the Embassy.
AuPair.step5_desc: Post-visa travel preparation, flight tickets, and pick-up service.
AuPair.iapa_p1: The International Au-Pair Association (IAPA) ensures your safety 100%. Founded in 1994, the association cooperates with over 150 member organizations in more than 45 countries.
AuPair.member_since: Top since 2011 The only one in Mongolia
AuPair.ecaps_p1: The committee defining Au-Pair standards in Europe. Establishes unified rules for host families, agencies, and Au-Pairs to follow, developing a quality program.

About.intro: We bridge cultures and create opportunities for Mongolian youth through the Au Pair program, fostering global citizenship and language mastery.
About.storyP1: Founded with a vision to connect Mongolian youth with global opportunities, we have grown into the nation's premier cultural exchange agency.
About.storyP2: Our journey is defined by the thousands of lives transformed through cultural immersion, language learning, and international friendships.
About.card1_text: We operate with full transparency and ethical standards in every placement.
About.card2_text: Commited to providing the highest quality support for both families and au pairs.
About.card3_text: Building a supportive network that lasts far beyond the program duration.
About.card4_text: Fostering personal and professional development through cultural exchange.

navbar.desc_de: Learn language for free in Germany
navbar.desc_at: Learn language for free in Austria
navbar.desc_ch: Learn language for free in Switzerland
navbar.desc_be: Learn language for free in Belgium

dashboard.motivationMissing: You haven't provided a motivation letter yet. Completing this helps your application immensely.
dashboard.startJourneyDesc: You are currently a Guest. Apply now to become a Student.

Applied.title: Initial Review
Applied.action: Our team is currently verifying your request. Please wait for approval to start the document phase.

Documents.title: Documents Needed
Documents.action: You are approved! Please upload your passport, certificates, and medical records to proceed.

Interview.title: Agency Interview
Interview.action: Prepare for your screening. We will contact you via Skype or Phone to schedule your interview.

Matching.title: Family Matching
Matching.action: Your profile is live! We are sharing it with host families. Keep your phone reachable for matching calls.

Visa.title: Visa Process
Visa.action: Match found! Prepare your embassy documents and schedule your visa appointment immediately.

Departure.title: Final Departure
Departure.action: Visa granted! Pack your bags and check your pre-departure guide for your trip to Europe.

germany.title: Germany
germany.subtitle: Economic Heart of Europe
germany.desc: Master the language in a world-leading nation while experiencing European culture and kickstarting your career.

austria.title: Austria
austria.subtitle: Cradle of Classical Art
austria.desc: A golden opportunity to master German while living amidst the breathtaking beauty of the Alps.

belgium.title: Belgium
belgium.subtitle: International Hub
belgium.desc: Experience multilingual culture at the headquarters of the European Union.

switzerland.title: Switzerland
switzerland.subtitle: Highest Quality of Life
switzerland.desc: Live with the world's highest allowance, purest air, and safest environment.

Auth.signupSubtitle: The first step to traveling the world, learning a language, and experiencing a new culture.
Auth.signinSubtitle: Sign in to check your personal information and application progress.
